content: The 2024-2025 state-of-the-art active learning agent memory architectures designed for episodic planning can be repurposed to create a hybrid curiosity-driven reinforcement learning objective that outperforms both ICM and RND by storing "curiosity traces" of unresolvable surprise, prioritizing revisiting these high-potential unknowns over continuously chasing trivial new stimuli. This hybrid framework leverages structured active memory to turn transient intrinsic reward signals into cumulative learning progress that aligns with long-horizon task goals.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
